programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A woman and her father have been trying to DIY her house for years, resulting in bad paint jobs and exposed concrete floors; now, they're ready to hand the reins over to Jenn, who looks to inject vintage style into a modern, single-woman space.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple is so perplexed by the layout of their 1960s home that they're ready to move; Jenn, however, wants to convince them to stay with a homestead-style renovation that combines vintage elements and cozy functionality with a modern organic twist.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple left the custom home they loved in Utah for her job; Jenn's goal is to get them to fall in love all over again by infusing a custom, contemporary vibe without changing the layout.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple's kids move out, and his mom is moving in, so it's time for an update; they're each wanting a New Orleans style office, a Florida coastal suite and an organic modern kitchen; Jenn looks to cohesively fuse their diverse styles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple loves the outdoorsy vibe of their lot, but not the house's many quirks; Jenn integrates wood ceilings and a dining room the size of a banquet hall into a traditional organic design to usher their eccentric house into the present.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple's blended family is leaving the nest, and they want to take back their house while still maintaining family feel; with a new kitchen, living room and bathroom, Jenn updates their '80s rancher with a rustic, industrial design.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer challenges two teams to thrift and transform a home office, pitting Palm Springs retro against Palm Beach prep. The two design families flex their haggling and out-of-the-box design solutions to create the office 2.0.

programme.title: Space Invaders
programme.desc: Steve's AD has led to clutter engulfing his townhouse, forcing wife Megan to sleep on the lounge.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer challenges two teams to thrift and transform a home office, pitting Palm Springs retro against Palm Beach prep. The two design families flex their haggling and out-of-the-box design solutions to create the office 2.0.

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: After getting married, a couple bought their beautiful Tudor home, started a business, had a baby and now another is on the way; Jenn looks to heighten their Tudor vibe and create a cohesive, cozy space to finally make their house feel like a home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple began renovations on their home when he suddenly passed away; now, Jenn is taking the reins to help her finish their dream home, bringing a traditional yet modern design that will keep his spirit alive while giving her a fresh start.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A family's DIY renovations quickly died on the vine when their busy lives got in the way; Jenn swoops in to take over, finishing their uncompleted projects and delivering his dream of a luxury Vegas bathroom with her love of coastal design.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A woman and her father have been trying to DIY her house for years, resulting in bad paint jobs and exposed concrete floors; now, they're ready to hand the reins over to Jenn, who looks to inject vintage style into a modern, single-woman space.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Roslyn wants Grant to use his deck skills on their decrepit deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: An expectant couple need help baby-proofing their disintegrating deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Anthony and Cristina need help rebuilding their aging, overgrown deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Paul helps a couple with a baby fix their rotting, dangerous deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Paul built his wife a makeshift deck, which now needs to be completely redone.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Paul expands a tiny deck for a large family.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Jeremy and Lisa are remodeling their cottage, which has a boring deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: A couple has wanted a new deck for 20 years.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Paul helps a couple rebuild their deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: A couple close to retirement want Paul's help repairing their dangerous deck.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: Paul helps to fix a temporary deck that was built in a weekend five years ago.

programme.title: Disaster Decks
programme.desc: A family's rotting deck has become a home for the neighborhood raccoons and they are unable to repair it to keep the critters out.

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The restoration of crumbling ancient villages and hamlets in France, Spain, Italy and Portugal.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: In the Nouvelle-Aquitaine region of France, disaster strikes just before Nicky and Graham prepare to welcome their first ever guests to their renovated ghost village; in Normandy, Hayley and Lee try to renovate their 18th-century hamlet.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: In Italy, Francesca and Carl start a business to fund the renovation of their second ghost village; in Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Nicky and Graham peel back years of neglect in their village; in Normandy, Hayley and Lee find what lies in their old pond.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: In Normandy, Hayley and Lee try to master the craft of lime mortaring; in Italy, an obstacle stands in the way of Francesca and Carl; in Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Nicky and Graham go all out to get a five-star rating for their ghost village.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The restoration of crumbling ancient villages and hamlets in France, Spain, Italy and Portugal.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: In Normandy, Hayley and Lee manage wet and windy weather; in Italy, Francesca and Carl balance running one village with renovating another; Cesidio prepares the next generation to lead.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: The restoration of crumbling ancient villages and hamlets in France, Spain, Italy and Portugal.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: The competition intensifies as teams head into their lake houses to transform their primary bedrooms and bathrooms; comfort and creativity take center stage as they showcase their vision and skill; while out on the lake, Scott and Bryan come up with a bold twist that pushes each duo even further out of their comfort zone; poor planning sends some teams scrambling towards risky shortcuts, and ambitious ideas spark clashes that threaten timelines.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Queens Newlyweds Take on the King's London
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds from Queens head to London for a job opportunity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Big Dreams, Tiny Budget in Freising, Germany
programme.desc: Disillusioned with the corporate grind, a young Canadian seeks a change in Freising, Germany; he's pursuing a master's degree and has lofty expectations for his new home, but his grand housing aspirations may clash with the reality of his budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Miami Model Finds a New Look in Thailand
programme.desc: A Miami model hopes to take her career to new heights by starting her modeling agency in Chiang Mai, Thailand; with low cost of living, Chiang Mai has become one of the most desirable places for digital nomads, so she faces some stiff competition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Mixing It Up in Mexico City
programme.desc: A young Texas family relocates for family ties and their son's international education to Mexico City; he's looking to launch a restaurant venture in Polanco, but it's a hot neighborhood, and it might be tough to get it.

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Mom Moves the Whole Gang to Malaga, Spain
programme.desc: After years in California, a mother of three convinces her partner to move to her native Malaga, Spain; she's always wanted to share the laid-back culture with her kids, but moving to her homeland may not be second nature for everyone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A television and film industry freelancer looks to return to London to start over; she's ready to begin a new chapter and possibly a new relationship, but first, she'll need to find a place that fits her needs and budget.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul designs a deck for a couple that never uses their backyard.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul builds a curving deck with plenty of circles and wood that's bent.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul and his crew replace Mike and Marina's utilitarian deck; Paul is ambitious about multi-functional design, complete with heated room and hot tub.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: A couple that loves to entertain gets an elegant deck.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul builds three separate deck spaces to fit with a backyard's features.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul designs a deck for a uniquely-shaped yard.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul builds a three-part deck with a dining zone, a shaded lounging area and another in the sun.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul builds a deck surrounded by waterfalls, a moat and an outdoor kitchen for two busy parents.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul builds a multilevel deck with two fire tables and built-in lighting and sound systems.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul builds a deck with three cascading waterfalls, an outdoor kitchen and a lounging area.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: Paul creates a deck with a huge barbecue, a curved staircase, and see-through fireplace.

programme.title: Decked Out
programme.desc: A uniquely shaped backyard gets a semicircle deck with overhead awnings.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Lisa is a passionate home chef who loves to cook for her family; the last space they have yet to address in their home is the old-school galley kitchen; Ellen will have to get creative to turn this kitchen disaster into the heart of the home.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Nominated by their daughter Brittany, Susan and Brad have lived in their craftsman for over 30 years; Susan doesn't think her tiny kitchen needs a glow up, so Ellen will have to convince her that change is sometimes a good thing.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Natalie just bought her own home in LA. It's perfect with just enough space, but she wants to extend the kitchen and improve the functionality and organization! Ellen will have to transform this tiny box of a kitchen into an entirely new space.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Kat is a cool, trendy gal with a passion for cooking that has led her to an incredibly successful career as restaurateur and a chef! The pressure is on Ellen in this episode as Kat is a friend and nothing but the best will do.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Margaret & Keith are former high school friends who fell for each other later in life and settled into a beautiful old Spanish influenced home. The Hunts have some serious ambition for their dated kitchen and it may be more than Ellen can handle.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Stephanie is a new mom that finds joy in cooking because of the memories she made in India growing up. Now, she is determined to pass those memories on. Ellen knows Stephanie is a super fan and is determined not to let her down.
